# Morphkit

> CLI tool that converts TypeScript/React web apps to native SwiftUI iOS apps.

npm package: `morphkit-cli`
Homepage: https://morphkit.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/ashlrai/morphkit

## CLI Commands

- `morphkit analyze <path>` — Analyze a web app, output semantic model JSON
- `morphkit generate <path>` — Generate a complete SwiftUI iOS project
- `morphkit preview <path>` — Preview generation without writing files
- `morphkit verify <path>` — Check completion status of a generated project
- `morphkit setup` — Register MCP server in Claude Code settings
- `morphkit sync <source> <target>` — Re-sync after web app changes
- `morphkit watch <path>` — Watch mode, re-generate on file changes

## MCP Server

Register: `morphkit setup` (writes to `.claude/settings.json`)
Command: `npx morphkit mcp`

### Tools

- `morphkit_analyze` — Analyze a web app → semantic model summary
- `morphkit_generate` — Full pipeline: analyze → generate SwiftUI project
- `morphkit_plan` — Prioritized implementation plan for iOS conversion
- `morphkit_screen_context` — Full context for completing a specific screen (view, models, API methods, reference patterns)
- `morphkit_verify` — Project completion check: build status, TODO census, completion %
- `morphkit_next_task` — Recommend next screen to implement

## AI Providers

Supports Claude (recommended), OpenAI, and Grok for enhanced analysis. Fully optional — all core functionality works with heuristic-based analysis when no AI key is set.

## Generated Output

When generating an iOS project, Morphkit also produces:
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI implementation guide with API contract, Swift conventions, completion manifest
- `.claude/commands/` — Slash commands: /complete-screen, /verify, /next, /complete-all
- `.claude/settings.json` — Auto-registers the MCP server
- `MORPHKIT-TODO` markers in Swift files — Structured TODOs (wire-api-fetch, wire-api-action, complete-model, implement-auth)

## Detailed Reference

See [llms-full.txt](https://morphkit.dev/llms-full.txt) for complete MCP tool schemas, MORPHKIT-TODO format, verify output structure, and CLI flag reference.
